name: Pricing
description: Explores comparison-first, recommendation-first, and guided pricing layouts across subscription and token allowance states.

layouts.name: Compare plans
layouts.description: Three plans remain visible so buyers can compare limits before committing.
layouts.hypothesis: Side-by-side comparison reduces uncertainty for buyers who already understand the product.

layouts.name: Recommended path
layouts.description: One plan leads while alternatives become a quieter supporting choice.
layouts.hypothesis: A strong recommendation reduces decision cost for first-time buyers.

layouts.name: Guided upgrade
layouts.description: Usage and the next available action lead; plan details become supporting evidence.
layouts.hypothesis: Existing customers care more about remaining capacity than a repeated plan comparison.

controls.label: Subscription
controls.description: Changes entitlement, highlighted pricing, and available token actions.

controls.label: Included tokens used
controls.description: Tests healthy, running-low, and exhausted plan allowance messaging.

controls.label: Extra tokens purchased
controls.description: Top subscribers can purchase up to the full extra allowance.

states.name: No subscription
states.description: A new buyer compares all available plans.

states.name: Starter · annual
states.description: An annual Starter customer has exhausted all 40k included tokens.

states.name: Team · running low
states.description: A six-seat Team account is approaching its included token allowance.

states.name: Top · no extra tokens
states.description: A Top customer can purchase the complete extra allowance.

states.name: Top · half purchased
states.description: Half of the optional token allowance remains available.

states.name: Top · allowance full
states.description: The customer has purchased the maximum extra allowance.
